California WIC App
California WIC App
Translate this page
Mobile WIC Phone App. Check your balance, foods, and more from the convenience of your phone.
Download the FREE
California WIC App
for

or

phones
iPhone

Before you go shopping for your WIC foods, follow these steps:
Register your WIC Card in the California WIC App
Have your phone and your WIC Card ready to shop
Stores accepting the California WIC Card
You can use the California WIC App to:
Scan food items to identify WIC authorized foods
Check your food balance and when your WIC benefits expire
Find WIC approved grocery stores
Look up the WIC Shopping Guide
Check on your next WIC appointment
Plus much more!
